games.name: Avalanche - Santa Ski Xmas
games.description:
Get ready for an exhilarating holiday adventure in Avalanche - Santa Ski Xmas! As an avalanche thunders down the mountain, it s up to Santa to navigate the snowy slopes in a thrilling ski race. Race against time and the elements as you collect presents scattered along the way, all while trying to avoid obstacles that can slow you down. The festive graphics and cheerful soundtrack will immerse you in the spirit of Christmas as you glide through the winter wonderland.

But Santa can t do it alone! Head over to the shop to upgrade Santa's skiing abilities. With each successful run, earn points and upgrade perks such as speed, agility, and even special abilities to help you tackle tougher slopes. The further you ski, the more gifts you can gather, leading to massive rewards and unlocking hidden characters that will diversify your skiing experience.

Compete for the highest score and challenge your friends to beat your records! The game supports both English and Russian, making it accessible for players from various backgrounds. So, don your ski gear, embrace the festive vibe, and let the adventure begin! It s the perfect game to enjoy during the holiday season and an excellent way to spread some Christmas cheer. Remember to ski safely and collect all the gifts waiting for you. Play now to experience the joy! Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!

How to play free Avalanche - Santa Ski Xmas game online

To start playing Avalanche - Santa Ski Xmas, simply use the arrow keys or swipe on your device to guide Santa down the mountain. Collect gifts along the way while dodging obstacles. Keep an eye on the power-ups available in the shop to enhance your skiing performance!
games.instructions: Tap to jump Keep holding to do backflip

games.name: Sliding Blocks
games.description:
Step into the engaging world of Sliding Blocks, where strategy and critical thinking are vital! Your objective is to guide the vibrant orange blocks to their designated spots on the grid. The mechanics are simple yet addictive: slide the blocks in different directions, and they will keep moving until they encounter a wall or another obstacle. Each move presents a new puzzle to solve, as you carefully plan your next direction to achieve victory.

Throughout your journey in the game, the challenges will evolve, requiring you to adapt your strategies. To succeed, you must think ahead and anticipate how each move affects the blocks' paths. Will you line them up in a single line, or will you need to maneuver around various obstacles? The colorful graphics and intuitive gameplay make for an enjoyable experience that can last for hours!

As you progress, you ll find yourself facing increasingly complex layouts, pushing your problem-solving skills to their limits. Can you manage to guide all the blocks to their goals without hitting any walls or getting stuck? Whether you're a casual gamer or a puzzle aficionado, Sliding Blocks offers a fun and stimulating challenge that will keep you coming back for more. Dive into the sliding action and enjoy a game that promises excitement with every single move!

How to play free Sliding Blocks game online

In Sliding Blocks, use your mouse or finger to select a block and slide it in the desired direction. Remember, blocks will continue moving until they hit a wall or another block. Plan your moves wisely and keep sliding until you reach the target locations for all the orange blocks!
games.instructions: Use arrows to move the player

games.name: Safari Jigsaw
games.description:
Welcome to Safari Jigsaw, a delightful puzzle experience where the wild brings together a mix of adorable and fierce creatures! As you immerse yourself in this thrilling game, you'll encounter a dazzling array of animals that range from the delightfully sweet to the intriguingly fearsome. Your objective is simple: piece together the jigsaw puzzles to unveil these magnificent animals hidden within the fragments. Each puzzle presents a unique challenge, ensuring every session feels fresh and exciting.

The charm of Safari Jigsaw lies in the vibrant visuals and the satisfying click of pieces snapping into place. This engaging activity not only entertains but also enhances cognitive skills like problem-solving and spatial awareness. Enjoy moving from one challenge to another, all while discovering fascinating wildlife. Can you figure out the puzzles before time runs out? As you successfully piece the animals together, you ll unlock a delightful gallery showcasing nature s cutest and scariest creatures, encouraging you to tackle more puzzles and explore more wildlife!

In this delightful game, every completed puzzle not only brings the animals to life but also brings you joy and a sense of accomplishment. So gather your focus, sharpen your mind, and dive into this colorful safari adventure, where every puzzle solved leads to more fun and learning!

How to play free Safari Jigsaw game online

To play Safari Jigsaw, simply select a puzzle level to begin. Once the pieces appear, drag and drop them into the correct position on the board. Work patiently to connect the pieces and reveal the stunning animal images. Challenge yourself to complete the puzzle within the shortest time possible!
games.instructions: Game Controls LEFT CLICK

games.name: Baby Hazel Birthday Surprise
games.description:
Get ready for a delightful adventure in Baby Hazel Birthday Surprise! In this engaging game, Baby Hazel is in a cheerful spirit, busy showering love on her adorable pets, Katy the cat and Bunny the bunny. Just when she's having fun, she receives a reminder call on her mobile about her best friend Akito's birthday. To her surprise, she realizes she almost forgot about the special day!

Determined to make it unforgettable, Baby Hazel quickly devises a grand plan to throw Akito the ultimate surprise birthday party. To bring her vision to life, she enlists the help of her other friends. Together, they set out on a mission to prepare everything for the celebration.

Throughout the game, players will assist Baby Hazel and her friends in various fun activities to get ready for the big event. From selecting party decorations to finding the perfect gifts, your help is essential in ensuring that everything goes according to plan. As you assist them, remember to cater to their needs and keep the party preparations a secret to surprise Akito!

How to play free Baby Hazel Birthday Surprise game online

To play the Baby Hazel Birthday Surprise game, simply use your mouse to interact with the various elements on the screen. Follow the prompts to complete tasks like gathering supplies, decorating the party area, and helping Hazel s friends. Keep an eye on the needs of each character to make sure the surprise party is a success!
games.instructions: Click or tap to play the game

games.name: Sweet Fruit Candy
games.description:
Welcome to the delightful world of Sweet Fruit Candy, where your matching skills will be put to the test! Immerse yourself in a vibrant atmosphere filled with colorful fruits as you embark on a sweet journey. Your goal is to create combinations of identical fruits by matching three or more in a row. The more fruits you match, the more points you earn, leading you closer to unlocking various exciting challenges.

As you navigate through the levels, you'll encounter numerous obstacles and challenges designed to keep you engaged. Each level offers a different layout, requiring strategic moves to clear the board efficiently. With a plethora of sweet fruits to discover, from juicy oranges to succulent strawberries, there's no shortage of pleasure as you play. The satisfying gameplay, combined with enticing visuals and cheerful sound effects, makes Sweet Fruit Candy an utterly enjoyable experience. Are you ready to satisfy your sweet tooth? PLAY NOW!

How to play free Sweet Fruit Candy game online

To play Sweet Fruit Candy, start by clicking on any adjacent fruits to create groups of three or more. Once matched, the fruits will disappear, giving you points and the chance to set up further combos. Continue matching fruits until you complete the level s objectives or reach the minimum score needed to advance!

games.name: UFO Smasher
games.description:
UFO Smasher presents an exhilarating adventure packed with action and excitement. In this thrilling night game, you take on the role of a brave hero, equipped with a powerful rescue ball blaster designed for one purpose: to annihilate the menacing UFOs invading your territory. With its success skyrocketing this month, players have reported a significant enhancement in performance, especially for those on mobile devices. Whether you're dodging pesky zombies or battling the fierce Cyberman, every challenge you face pushes your skills to the limit.

The gameplay is designed to be intuitive and engaging. Players can easily control their actions using simple touch screen buttons that allow for quick response times. You ll need to master arrow shooting techniques as you blast through waves of enemies and destructive obstacles, ensuring that no UFO goes unscathed. The thrilling mechanics of rocket bird shooting intensify the experience, adding even more layers of strategy and fun, as you aim to evade obstacles while firing at targets with precision.

UFO Smasher has garnered glowing reviews and a dedicated player base, thanks to its immersive gameplay and vibrant graphics. As the tension builds each night, the thrill of being a hero in this cybernetic battlefield is unmatched. Get ready to save the day as you confront the alien threat head-on!

To play UFO Smasher, simply touch the screen buttons to control your blaster. Aim at the UFOs and other enemies, and use the arrow shooting technique to unleash your firepower. Don't forget to dodge incoming attacks from zombies and Cyberman while keeping your focus on destroying the invaders!

games.name: Ninja Treasure Match 3
games.description:
Ninja Treasure Match 3 is an exhilarating online puzzle game designed for treasure hunters and puzzle enthusiasts alike, and the best part? It s completely free! In this vibrant world filled with colorful gems, you'll take on the role of a nimble ninja whose goal is to gather precious treasures. The gameplay is simple yet captivating, making it accessible to players of all ages.

To embark on your quest, you need to connect three or more gems of the same color by drawing a line to eliminate them from the board. The satisfaction of creating beautiful combos is a rewarding experience, and if you manage to link five or more gems, you re in for a delightful bonus as well as additional time to keep playing! Each level presents a unique challenge, requiring strategy and quick thinking to maximize your score and advance to the next stage.

As you progress, the game introduces various obstacles and power-ups that will either aid or hinder your mission. You ll find that planning your moves carefully can lead to spectacular chain reactions, clearing the board and unearthing treasures galore. Ninja Treasure Match 3 promises hours of fun and excitement as you continue to unlock new levels while competing for high scores.

How to play free Ninja Treasure Match 3 game online

To play Ninja Treasure Match 3, simply click and drag your finger across the screen to connect gems of the same color. Aim to align three or more gems to eliminate them. Keep an eye out for special bonuses that appear when you match five or more, allowing you extra time to keep the treasure hunt going!
games.instructions: Use mouse or touch the screen

games.name: Box Delivery Trucks Hidden
games.description:
Box Delivery Trucks Hidden is an engaging free online game that combines elements of memory challenges and monster truck adventure. In this thrilling game, players are invited to flip tiles and uncover hidden images of delivery trucks. The goal is straightforward: match the tiles in pairs to win. With an emphasis on memory and concentration, this game promises to be both entertaining and intellectually stimulating.

As you dive into the experience, you will encounter a total of four exciting levels, each progressively increasing in difficulty. Efficiently matching all the pairs of tiles within the fewest moves will test your skills and strategic thinking, providing a satisfying challenge that keeps you on your toes. With colorful graphics and delightful sound effects, Box Delivery Trucks Hidden offers a captivating environment that makes the gameplay even more enjoyable.

Using your mouse, you can click on the tiles or simply tap the screen if you re using a mobile device. Remember to stay focused and keep your wits about you, as it s easy to lose track amidst the excitement. The game demands your full concentration, making it a perfect way to hone your memory skills while having fun. So, gather your friends or challenge yourself alone, and see how quickly you can complete the game!

How to play free Box Delivery Trucks Hidden game online

To start playing Box Delivery Trucks Hidden, use your mouse to click on any two tiles to reveal their images. Your aim is to find matching pairs within a limited number of moves. If the tiles match, they will remain face-up; if not, they will flip back. Keep track of your moves and try to complete the game as quickly as possible!
games.instructions: Use your mouse to play or tap on the screen

games.name: Dino Runner
games.description:
Dino Runner is an exciting and engaging game designed to entertain children and adults alike. This delightful adventure invites players to step into the shoes (or rather, the paws) of one of four charming dinosaurs: Rex, Mimi, Dino, or Bob. Each character adds a unique flair to the game, making it even more enjoyable as you embark on an exhilarating journey through vibrant landscapes filled with thrilling obstacles and challenges.

As you race against the clock, your goal is simple yet immensely satisfying: run as far as possible without hitting obstacles or falling into traps. The gameplay is reminiscent of a beloved classic, ensuring that fans of all ages will find themselves immersed in the fast-paced action. The colorful graphics and lively soundtrack create an inviting atmosphere that encourages players to keep pushing their limits.

With easy-to-learn controls and addictive gameplay, Dino Runner is perfect for those looking to have fun and test their reflexes. As you dodge hazards and leap over gaps, you'll find yourself lost in a world of dinosaurs and excitement. Compete with your friends to see who can achieve the highest score, or strive to beat your own records. Regardless of how you choose to play, the thrill of Dino Runner is bound to keep you entertained for hours!

How to play free Dino Runner game online

To play Dino Runner, simply start the game in your browser. Use the spacebar or touchscreen to jump over obstacles, and keep running to gain speed. Make sure to collect power-ups along the way for a speed boost and aim for the highest score possible. Enjoy the adventure!

games.name: Lof Parking
games.description:
Welcome to Lof Parking, a thrilling simulation game that tests your parking prowess and driving skills. In this engaging challenge, you'll take control of a vehicle and navigate it towards a designated parking spot. Your objective is to maneuver the car carefully, steering clear of other vehicles and obstacles along the way.

As you embark on this parking adventure, you have five chances to successfully park the car in each level. However, every collision with a wall or another car will result in the loss of one chance. This means that precision and timing are crucial, as you must find a way to park your vehicle quickly and safely to maximize your score. The game features ten meticulously designed levels that progressively increase in difficulty, offering a perfect blend of excitement and challenge.

The more you practice, the better you ll get at avoiding accidents and parking in tight spaces. Your ultimate goal is to complete all levels to emerge as the champion of Lof Parking. Are you ready to put your driving skills to the test and prove your parking expertise?

How to play free Lof Parking game online

To play the game, use the arrow keys or on-screen controls to steer your car towards the parking spot. Pay attention to your surroundings to avoid collisions with other cars and obstacles. Aim to park as quickly as possible to earn a higher score while managing your limited chances effectively!
games.instructions: On Touch-Screen devices you can use buttons to drive the car On all devices with keyboards you can use arrow keys to drive the car

games.name: Finger Football
games.description:
Experience the joy of soccer in a unique and hilarious way with Finger Football! This entertaining turn-based game is perfect for kids who love soccer and enjoy engaging in fun, competitive play. Players can choose between two modes to suit their preference: the Single Player mode, where you can hone your skills against a computer opponent, or the Two Players mode, allowing you to challenge a friend and see who has the best finger-football skills.

Finger Football is not just about kicking a ball; it involves strategy, precision, and a little bit of luck. Perfect for gatherings, parties, or just a casual afternoon, this game will keep young players entertained and engaged. With vibrant graphics and amusing animations, each match is packed with excitement. Whether you're scoring goals or executing skillful moves, every game is bound to bring lots of laughs and memorable moments.

The easy-to-learn mechanics make it accessible for children of all ages. With the ability to play against friends or the AI, kids will love refining their technique while enjoying a spirited competition. Finger Football is the ultimate choice for budding athletes looking to have a great time playing soccer in a light-hearted, turn-based format.

How to play free Finger Football game online

To play the Finger Football game, start by selecting either Single Player or Two Players mode. Use your finger to flick the ball, aiming to score goals while trying to block your opponent's shots. Take turns with your opponent, strategizing your moves to outplay them and earn points. Have fun!
games.instructions: Choose one of the selections of the America s Cup or Euro Cup choose one of the tactics available and start playing the game

games.name: Chip and Dale 2021 Slide
games.description:
Join the lovable chipmunks, Chip and Dale, in the exhilarating adventure of the Chip and Dale 2021 Slide. These iconic characters, known for their mischievous antics and teamwork, are back to sweep you off your feet once again. This time, they need your help to gather all the images from their exciting cartoon series. Are you ready to embark on this entertaining quest?

Not only does Chip and Dale 2021 Slide offer fun puzzles, but it also immerses you in the charming world of these beloved characters. With delightful graphics and engaging sounds, this game brings nostalgia to long-time fans while introducing new players to the whimsical escapades of Chip and Dale. How to play free Chip and Dale 2021 Slide game online

To play the Chip and Dale 2021 Slide game, select the puzzle you wish to solve. Use your mouse to slide the pieces around the board, aiming to reconnect the scrambled image. Work swiftly but strategically to complete the puzzle before time runs out and enjoy the delightful visuals of Chip and Dale!
games.instructions: Use mouse or tap the screen

games.name: Bottle Push
games.description:
Bottle Push is an engaging physics-based puzzle game that challenges players to think critically and creatively. Your main objective is to tap on various bottles strategically to ensure that the juice inside collects all the stars scattered throughout the levels. Each level presents a unique set of physics challenges that require a good understanding of momentum, angles, and the physical properties of liquids.

As you progress through the game, the puzzles become more complex, prompting you to apply your knowledge of physics in innovative ways. You'll need to analyze the best angles and force of your taps to manipulate the bottles effectively, helping the juice reach its goal. The delightful graphics and sound effects further enhance the gaming experience, making every successful collection of stars immensely satisfying.

The game is designed for players of all ages, making it an excellent option for both casual gamers and puzzle enthusiasts. With numerous levels to explore, each offering different challenges and creative obstacles, Bottle Push promises hours of engaging gameplay. Whether you're looking to improve your problem-solving skills or simply enjoy a fun experience, this game is sure to entertain.

How to play free Bottle Push game online

To play Bottle Push, simply tap the bottles to release the juice and guide it towards the stars. Utilize your understanding of physics to predict the juice's movement and adjust your taps accordingly. Collect all the stars in each level to advance and enjoy the challenge!
games.instructions: Mouse To Play

games.name: Creepy Doll Jigsaw
games.description:
Creepy Doll Jigsaw is an engaging online puzzle game that will test your problem-solving skills and patience. With a hauntingly beautiful theme centered around eerie dolls, this jigsaw puzzle experience offers a unique blend of excitement and intrigue. Players are presented with 64 intricately designed pieces that must be carefully arranged to complete the final image. The challenge lies not only in how the pieces fit together but also in piecing together a picture that tells a story of mystery and creepiness. Suitable for all ages, this game promises to keep you entertained during your free time!

The various levels of difficulty and the captivating visuals make Creepy Doll Jigsaw a perfect escape for casual gamers and puzzle enthusiasts alike. As you immerse yourself in this fascinating jigsaw adventure, you'll find yourself lost in the art of puzzle solving. Assemble these pieces at your own pace and revel in the satisfaction of unveiling the completed artwork, all while relishing the thrill of the creepy doll themes.

In addition to being a fantastic way to pass the time, Creepy Doll Jigsaw also helps to improve cognitive skills such as memory, spatial awareness, and critical thinking. So whether you are alone or with friends, get ready to embrace the eerie charm and embark on a captivating puzzle journey that will leave you wanting more!

How to play free Creepy Doll Jigsaw game online

To play Creepy Doll Jigsaw, simply click on the puzzle pieces and drag them into their correct positions on the board. Use the available hints if you get stuck, and rearrange pieces as needed to complete the picture. Enjoy solving the puzzle within the time limit or at your own leisurely pace!
games.instructions: Mouse Drag and Drop

games.name: Lobster Jump Adventure
games.description:
Lobster Jump Adventure invites players of all ages to dive into an exhilarating and delightful jumping experience! The objective is straightforward: maintain your presence on the screen for as long as possible. Players control a spirited lobster as it leaps from one jellyfish to another, dodging obstacles while striving to catch as many red fish as possible along the way.

The vibrant underwater world is filled with colorful graphics and engaging sound effects that create a playful atmosphere. As the lobster expertly navigates the ocean surface, quick reflexes and strategic jumps become essential for success. Stay vigilant and avoid the perils that lurk at the top and bottom of the screen, as touching these areas will end your adventure prematurely. This action-packed game not only boosts hand-eye coordination and quick thinking but also offers ample entertainment for everyone involved, making it the perfect choice for family fun or a quick solo challenge.

The combination of an easy-to-understand premise and an addictive gameplay mechanic ensures that Lobster Jump Adventure will keep players coming back for more. With every jump, players are rewarded with satisfying visuals and the thrill of competing against their own high scores. Each attempt promises new challenges, allowing players to refine their skills and experience the joy of progress.

How to play free Lobster Jump Adventure game online

To play Lobster Jump Adventure, simply use the on-screen controls to jump between jellyfish. Tap the screen to jump upward while collecting red fish for bonus points. Keep an eye out to avoid the top and bottom of the screen to stay in the game as long as possible!
games.instructions: Arrow keys or tap to play

games.name: Head Football - Champions
games.description:
Step into the thrilling world of soccer with Head Football - Champions, a dynamic game focused on the prestigious Champions League 19/20 season. Engage with 32 elite teams from the world of football, where each match presents a unique challenge and requires strategic acumen to emerge victorious.

Your journey begins in the group stage, where tactical planning is crucial against sophisticated artificial intelligence. Navigate your way through intense matches, aiming to secure a place in the last 16. Surviving this test of strength will set the stage for the semi-finals, where you must lock horns with the fiercest opponents yet. Each step brings you closer to the ultimate prize: the Champions League trophy.

Prepare yourself for the final match, which many consider one of the most demanding challenges in the game. Here, only the most exceptional strategies and expertise will lead to glory, as you strive to outsmart your rivals and claim your rightful place in football history.

How to play free Head Football - Champions game online

To play the Head Football - Champions game, simply select your team and use keyboard controls to navigate. The aim is to score goals while defending against your opponent. Master your moves, employ strategic plays, and keep an eye on the timer to secure victory in each match!

games.name: Extreme Bikers

Experience the thrill of two-wheeled adventures in Extreme Bikers, where adrenaline meets agility.
